incident.message: Not targeting the latest versions of Android; compatibility modes apply. Consider testing and updating this version. Consult the `android.os.Build.VERSION_CODES` javadoc for details.
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
Limit vector icons sizes to 200×200 to keep icon drawing fast; see https://developer.android.com/studio/write/vector-asset-studio#when for more
A newer version of Gradle than 9.4.0 is available: 9.4.1
A newer version of com.android.application than 9.1.1 is available: 9.2.0
A newer version of `compileSdk` than 34 is available: 36
A newer version of androidx.core:core-ktx than 1.12.0 is available: 1.18.0
A newer version of androidx.appcompat:appcompat than 1.6.1 is available: 1.7.1
A newer version of com.google.android.material:material than 1.11.0 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.activity:activity-ktx than 1.8.2 is available: 1.13.0
A newer version of androidx.constraintlayout:constraintlayout than 2.1.4 is available: 2.2.1
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-fragment-ktx than 2.7.7 is available: 2.9.8
A newer version of androidx.navigation:navigation-ui-ktx than 2.7.7 is available: 2.9.8
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-livedata-ktx than 2.7.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.lifecycle:lifecycle-viewmodel-ktx than 2.7.0 is available: 2.10.0
A newer version of androidx.fragment:fragment-ktx than 1.6.2 is available: 1.8.9
A newer version of androidx.viewpager2:viewpager2 than 1.0.0 is available: 1.1.0
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlin.android than 2.3.0 is available: 2.3.21
A newer version of io.coil-kt:coil than 2.6.0 is available: 2.7.0
A newer version of org.jetbrains.kotlinx:kotlinx-coroutines-android than 1.7.3 is available: 1.10.2

The application adaptive icon is missing a monochrome tag
The application adaptive roundIcon is missing a monochrome tag
Use the KTX extension property `View.isGone` instead?

fix-replace.description: Replace with the isGone extension property
fix-replace.family: Replace with the isGone extension property

Number formatting does not take into account locale settings. Consider using `String.format` instead.

Hardcoded string "AI가 분석 중입니다…", should use `@string` resource

Hardcoded string "생활 습관 권장 사항", should use `@string` resource
Hardcoded string "⚠ 이 분석은 AI가 생성한 참고 정보이며 의학적 진단을 대체하지 않습니다. 지속적인 통증은 반드시 전문의와 상담하세요.", should use `@string` resource
